category: Tone, style and talking about ourselves
rule: While sentences should be as short as possible, if you have a long sentence like this one to explain and elaborate a specific idea, follow it up with a short one. It helps readability.

category: Tone, style and talking about ourselves
rule: Always write in active rather than passive tense (unless hideous). Rather than: It was the opinion of several experts that... Write: Several experts report that…
The footnotes should be no more than two lines long
